title: 2 Top Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold for 2023 and Beyond
text: If you're willing to play the long game, they'll put money in your pocket for decades.

title: Why Steris Stock Was a Flop This Week
text: A big earnings miss turned investors off, as did reduced guidance.

title: STERIS plc (STE) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: STERIS plc (NYSE:STE ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call February 9, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Julie Winter - IR Daniel Carestio - President and CEO Michael Tokich - SVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Dave Turkaly - JMP Securities Matthew Mishan - KeyBanc Jacob Johnson - Stephens Mike Matson - Needham & Company Jason Bednar - Piper Sandler Michael Polark - Wolfe Research Matthew Mishan - KeyBanc Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the STERIS plc Third Quarter 2023 Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] Please also note, today's event is being recorded.

title: STERIS (STE) Q3 Earnings Miss Estimates, Margins Down Y/Y
text: Negative foreign currency and the impact of increased supply chain and inflationary costs hurt STERIS (STE) revenues in the fiscal third quarter.

title: Steris (STE) Lags Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Steris (STE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -9.01% and 4.36%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
